summary: Tested iteration 33 features: Hotel booking modal, blog share buttons, and footer Other Destinations. Fixed backend issue where 'time' field was required for hotel bookings. All features now working correctly.

fixed.issue: time field was required, causing 422 error for hotel bookings
fixed.fix: Made time field optional with default empty string, added date_checkout field for hotels

backend_api.hotel_booking_without_time: PASS - Hotels can be booked without time field

frontend_ui.hotel_card_flip_book_button: PASS - Opens BookingRequestModal from card back
frontend_ui.hotel_modal_no_time: PASS - Time dropdown hidden for hotels
frontend_ui.hotel_modal_no_dietary: PASS - Dietary preferences hidden for hotels
frontend_ui.hotel_modal_no_allergies: PASS - Allergies field hidden for hotels
frontend_ui.restaurant_modal_has_time: PASS - Time dropdown visible for restaurants
frontend_ui.blog_share_whatsapp: PASS - WhatsApp button with wa.me URL
frontend_ui.blog_share_twitter: PASS - Twitter button with intent/tweet URL
frontend_ui.blog_share_facebook: PASS - Facebook button with sharer URL
frontend_ui.footer_other_destinations: PASS - Section visible with correct content

passed_tests: Hotel booking modal opens from QuickView and card back
Hotel modal shows Check-in/Check-out (not time dropdown)
Hotel modal hides dietary preferences and allergies
Hotel booking submits successfully to API
Restaurant booking modal unchanged (has time, dietary, allergies)
Blog share buttons (WhatsApp, Twitter, Facebook) visible and correct URLs
Footer Other Destinations section with golfgatecatalunya.es link
critical_code_review_comments: BookingRequestModal.jsx: Well-implemented conditional rendering for hotel vs restaurant/beach_club
HotelPartners.jsx: Correctly changed <a> to <button> for booking, opens modal instead of external link
QuickViewModal.jsx: Line 106 correctly includes 'hotel' in onBooking condition
BlogPostPage.jsx: Share buttons properly implemented with correct social media URLs
Footer.jsx: Other Destinations section well-organized with active link and coming soon items
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Made time field optional, added date_checkout field in BookingRequestCreate model
/app/backend/tests/test_hotel_booking_and_features.py - New test file for iteration 33 features
seed_data_creation: Created test booking requests with TEST_ prefix for hotels, restaurants, beach clubs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 features fully tested and working. Backend BookingRequestCreate model updated to make 'time' optional and added 'date_checkout' field for hotel bookings. Hotel cards now open inquiry form instead of external links. Blog share buttons and footer Other Destinations section working correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Hotel booking form submission failed with 'Something went wrong' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend BookingRequestCreate Pydantic model had 'time: str' as required field. Frontend sends 'time: undefined' for hotels which gets stripped, causing 422 validation error.
reproduction_steps: 5. Error: 'Something went wrong. Please try again.'
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed 'time: str' to 'time: Optional[str] = ""' and added 'date_checkout: Optional[str] = None' in BookingRequestCreate model at line 139 of server.py
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Hotel booking now submits successfully and shows success modal
